# Sub 9: Sub-daemon cluster co-location (bridge + kb-alerting + kb-gc + kb-reconciliation) with daemon.mjs naming

## Parent Epic

#11831 — Sub 9 of Epic (folder-structure cleanup; sub-daemon co-location).

## Scope

Move the 4 sub-daemon clusters into per-daemon folders matching Sub 8's `ai/daemons/orchestrator/` pattern. Each cluster: service-logic class + `daemon.mjs` entry-point + any private helpers.

## Source moves

| From | To |
|---|---|
| `ai/scripts/bridge-daemon.mjs` | `ai/daemons/bridge/daemon.mjs` |
| `ai/scripts/bridge-daemon-queries.mjs` | `ai/daemons/bridge/queries.mjs` (rename per folder-context) |
| `ai/daemons/KbAlertingService.mjs` | `ai/daemons/kb-alerting/KbAlertingService.mjs` |
| `ai/scripts/kb-alerting-daemon.mjs` | `ai/daemons/kb-alerting/daemon.mjs` |
| `ai/daemons/KbGarbageCollectionService.mjs` | `ai/daemons/kb-gc/KbGarbageCollectionService.mjs` |
| `ai/scripts/kb-gc-daemon.mjs` | `ai/daemons/kb-gc/daemon.mjs` |
| `ai/daemons/KbReconciliationService.mjs` | `ai/daemons/kb-reconciliation/KbReconciliationService.mjs` |
| `ai/scripts/kb-reconciliation-daemon.mjs` | `ai/daemons/kb-reconciliation/daemon.mjs` |

## Test moves (mirror source)

- `test/playwright/unit/ai/daemons/KbAlertingService.spec.mjs` → `test/playwright/unit/ai/daemons/kb-alerting/KbAlertingService.spec.mjs`
- `test/playwright/unit/ai/daemons/KbGarbageCollectionService.spec.mjs` → `test/playwright/unit/ai/daemons/kb-gc/KbGarbageCollectionService.spec.mjs`
- `test/playwright/unit/ai/daemons/KbReconciliationService.spec.mjs` → `test/playwright/unit/ai/daemons/kb-reconciliation/KbReconciliationService.spec.mjs`
- (No bridge unit spec exists currently.)

## package.json

- `"ai:kb-alerting"` script path: `./ai/scripts/kb-alerting-daemon.mjs` → `./ai/daemons/kb-alerting/daemon.mjs`
- `"ai:kb-gc"`        script path: `./ai/scripts/kb-gc-daemon.mjs` → `./ai/daemons/kb-gc/daemon.mjs`
- `"ai:kb-reconciliation"` script path: `./ai/scripts/kb-reconciliation-daemon.mjs` → `./ai/daemons/kb-reconciliation/daemon.mjs`

## .github/workflows

(none affected — no workflows reference bridge-daemon or kb-*-daemon paths)

## Integration tests

- `test/playwright/integration/ai/kb-ingestion/multi-tenant.spec.mjs:114` — `await import('./ai/daemons/KbReconciliationService.mjs')` → update path

## Acceptance Criteria

1. 8 source moves + 3 test moves completed.
2. 3 npm scripts updated.
3. 1 integration test import updated.
4. All affected unit + integration specs pass.
5. `npm run ai:kb-alerting`, `npm run ai:kb-gc`, `npm run ai:kb-reconciliation` all work.
6. Bridge-daemon-queries (now `bridge/queries.mjs`) consumed correctly by Orchestrator (cross-cluster import).

## Depends on

Sub 8 #11844 (must merge first to free Orchestrator-cluster move; otherwise Sub 9 conflicts).

**Authored by:** [Claude Opus 4.7] (Claude Code)

- 2026-05-23T14:57:05Z @tobiu referenced in commit `6cc9179` - "refactor(agentos): orchestrator-cluster co-location ai/daemons/orchestrator/ + daemon.mjs (#11844) (#11849)

* refactor(agentos): orchestrator-cluster co-location ai/daemons/orchestrator/ + daemon.mjs (#11844)

Sub 8 of Epic #11831. Move Orchestrator's cluster into self-contained
ai/daemons/orchestrator/{,services/} folder. Entry-script renamed to
daemon.mjs (folder context provides daemon identity).

13 source moves + 12 test moves (mirror structure) + ai/services.mjs +
7 buildScripts/ai/ consumer-import updates + package.json ai:orchestrator
path update.

Tests: 119/119 pass (6.6s).

Subsequent subs filed: Sub 9 #11845, Sub 10 #11846, Sub 11 #11847, Sub 12 #11848.

* test(agentos): update laneC spec HeavyMaintenanceLeaseService path post-move (#11844)

Sub 8 #11844 moved HeavyMaintenanceLeaseService into
ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/. laneCManualScriptLeaseAdoption.spec.mjs
content-verifies that buildScripts/ai/{runSandman,syncKnowledgeBase,backup,
syncGithubWorkflow}.mjs import the lease service from the canonical path.
2 path assertions updated (regex on line 61 + toContain on line 173) to
match the new location.

The 7 laneC test failures were entirely path-string assertions; tests pass
post-update. Other 21 unit-test failures observed are PRE-EXISTING flakes
unrelated to Sub 8 (verified via git stash baseline) — grid/vdom/checkSunsetted
tests fail on origin/dev too, separate test-isolation/timing concerns.

* fix(agentos): update MailboxService.spec dynamic import for SwarmHeartbeatService post-move (#11844)

Sub 8 co-located SwarmHeartbeatService into ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/
but my static-import sweep regex (`from '...'`) missed dynamic `await import(...)`
call-sites. CI unit job 26335211375 caught: MailboxService.spec.mjs:49
`await import('../../../../../../ai/daemons/SwarmHeartbeatService.mjs')`
threw `Cannot find module`.

Fix: insert `/orchestrator/services` into the dynamic-import path. Local
re-run: 59/59 tests pass.

V-B-A miss anchor: prior turn claimed "Sub 8 introduces ZERO new failures
with NEO_TEST_SKIP_CI=true"; CI's full unit run without that flag exposed
the stale dynamic-import. Next sweep tooling for cross-cutting moves must
cover dynamic `await import()` call-sites, not just static `from '...'`.

Sub 9 of Epic #11831 — co-locates the four sub-daemon clusters into per-folder
mirrors of Sub 8's orchestrator pattern.

Source moves (8):
- ai/scripts/bridge-daemon.mjs            → ai/daemons/bridge/daemon.mjs
- ai/scripts/bridge-daemon-queries.mjs    → ai/daemons/bridge/queries.mjs (renamed)
- ai/daemons/KbAlertingService.mjs        → ai/daemons/kb-alerting/KbAlertingService.mjs
- ai/scripts/kb-alerting-daemon.mjs       → ai/daemons/kb-alerting/daemon.mjs
- ai/daemons/KbGarbageCollectionService.mjs → ai/daemons/kb-gc/KbGarbageCollectionService.mjs
- ai/scripts/kb-gc-daemon.mjs             → ai/daemons/kb-gc/daemon.mjs
- ai/daemons/KbReconciliationService.mjs  → ai/daemons/kb-reconciliation/KbReconciliationService.mjs
- ai/scripts/kb-reconciliation-daemon.mjs → ai/daemons/kb-reconciliation/daemon.mjs

Test moves (5 — ticket undercounted; included pre-existing bridge specs):
- bridge-daemon.spec.mjs         → ai/daemons/bridge/daemon.spec.mjs
- bridge-daemon-queries.spec.mjs → ai/daemons/bridge/queries.spec.mjs
- KbAlertingService.spec.mjs          → ai/daemons/kb-alerting/
- KbGarbageCollectionService.spec.mjs → ai/daemons/kb-gc/
- KbReconciliationService.spec.mjs    → ai/daemons/kb-reconciliation/

package.json: 3 npm script paths updated (ai:kb-alerting/kb-gc/kb-reconciliation).

Orchestrator wiring:
- Orchestrator.mjs:14-16  bridge-daemon-queries import → '../bridge/queries.mjs'
- TaskDefinitions.mjs:70  bridgeDaemon.args path → resolve('../daemons/bridge/daemon.mjs')
- TaskDefinitions.mjs:72  expectedCommand → 'daemons/bridge/daemon.mjs' (unique
  among the 5 daemon.mjs files post-Sub-8/9)
- bridge/daemon.mjs:179   enforceSingleton() process.command substring check
  updated to 'daemons/bridge/daemon.mjs' (was 'bridge-daemon.mjs')
- SummarizationCoordinatorService.mjs:8  bridge-daemon-queries import path
- KbAlertRuleEngine + KbGarbageCollectionEngine + KbReconciliationEngine: JSDoc @see paths
- CoalescingEngineService: code reference path
- multi-tenant integration spec:114 dynamic import path

V-B-A discipline from Sub 8 (#11844): swept BOTH static `from '...'` AND
dynamic `await import('...')` call-sites. Local full unit run: 2011 passed,
19 failed (all pre-existing — Authorization, checkAllAgentIdle, checkSunsetted,
QueryReRanker, TextEmbeddingService.retry, WriteSideInvariant, Grid family;
none reference moved files; confirmed via grep).

Authored by Claude Opus 4.7 (Claude Code). Session 5572d9a5-558d-4bea-b416-e31496c289c4.

FAIR-band: in-band [verify @ merge-gate]

Resolves #11846

Sub 10 of Epic #11831 — moves the 10 cross-daemon services out of
`ai/daemons/services/` (cleared by Subs 8 + 9) into thematic
`ai/services/{graph,ingestion}/` folders mirroring the existing
`ai/services/{github-workflow,gitlab-workflow,knowledge-base,memory-core,neural-link}/`
buckets. Empty `ai/daemons/services/` folder removed.

Source moves to ai/services/graph/ (6):
- GapInferenceEngine.mjs + GoldenPathSynthesizer.mjs + GraphMaintenanceService.mjs
- LazyEdgeDrainer.mjs + SemanticGraphExtractor.mjs + TopologyInferenceEngine.mjs

Source moves to ai/services/ingestion/ (4):
- ConceptDiscoveryService.mjs + ConceptIngestor.mjs + IssueIngestor.mjs
- MemorySessionIngestor.mjs

Test moves mirror source structure (7 files).

Depth preserved (both old `ai/daemons/services/X` and new
`ai/services/{graph,ingestion}/X` are 2-deep under `ai/`), so consumer
import rewrites are pure substring substitutions `daemons/services/X.mjs`
→ `services/{folder}/X.mjs` regardless of consumer location. 22 consumer
files updated.

Manual fixes for relative-path consumers whose strings DIDN'T contain the
literal `daemons/` segment:
- Orchestrator.mjs:32 — `'../services/GoldenPathSynthesizer.mjs'` (resolves
  to old via `ai/daemons/services/`) → `'../../services/graph/...'`
- DreamService.mjs:14-23 — 9× `'../../services/X.mjs'` pattern → `'../../../services/{folder}/...'`

V-B-A from Sub 9 (#11845) lesson: my regex-only sweep missed paths that
resolve to the moved location but don't contain the explicit `daemons/`
segment. Two-stage sweep (substring rewrite + grep for proximity-relative
patterns) caught both classes here.

Local validation:
- Moved-spec subsuite (graph/ingestion): 61/61 pass
- Orchestrator suite: 119/119 pass (DreamService spec required individual rerun
  due to parallel-worker flake; passes deterministically)
- Touched consumer specs (5): 130/130 pass
- Full unit suite: 2011 pass / 19 fail / 2 skip / 10 did-not-run — all 19
  failures are pre-existing flakes (Authorization, checkAllAgentIdle,
  checkSunsetted, QueryReRanker, SessionSummarization, TextEmbeddingService.retry,
  Grid family, vdom/table); verified zero references to moved files via grep.

Per @tobiu "you and me" instruction: no peer-review broadcast on this lane.
